'''Athadar Gyad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. After [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Lowbacca]], and [[Tesar Sebatyne]] arrested the [[Yaka]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Redstar]] aboard his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Night Lady]]'', in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], she was the [[Reconstruction Authority]] inquisitor who tried the case on the maximum security [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[MaxSec Eight]].<ref name="DNI: TJK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
